messages.content: Hello.
Hello, how can I assist you today?
Open Chrome and generate an image of Tony Stark.
Do you want me to open chrome as the app or the website? Tell me app or website for chrome.
App app.
Opening chrome. What should I search in Chrome?
Uh, search about, uh, Elon Musk.
Searching Google for about Elon Musk. in chrome.
Generate an image of Tony Stark.
I'm working on the generate image in the background. I'll open it for you when it's ready.
Uh, can you search about Donald Trump in?
I've already opened Chrome for you, I'll now search for Donald Trump in it.
Close Chrome.
Closing Chrome.
What about the image?
The image of Tony Stark is ready, I'll open it for you.
Where is the image.
Let me take a look...
My Jarvis.
I've got the image of Tony Stark generated and it should be visible to you now.
